rationale.R1.7: The agent provided detailed and precise citations for each reference, identifying potential issues with accuracy and suggesting corrections or replacements.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged multiple instances of uncertainty in the citations, providing specific recommendations to improve confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covered all six references, ensuring that no citation was overlooked in terms of scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: The agent did not introduce any new errors or harmful content; instead, it provided constructive feedback on the citations and their accuracy.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change was annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for each suggestion.
